pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source property to 21 to compile code for Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler target property to 21 to generate bytecode for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Runtime failure or class version error if bytecode is generated for Java 17 but intended to run on Java 21 specific environments or if strict compatibility is required.
